reviews.comment:
Es una estación de servicio ubicada en un predio enorme, amplia, impecable los baños y el bar...todo funciona bien...lo que se busca en una estación de servicio!! Comodisima

(Translated by Google)
It's a gas station located on a huge property, spacious, the restrooms and the bar are spotless...everything works well...exactly what you'd expect from a gas station! Very comfortable

reviews.comment:
Sucio, tuve que limpiar la mesa antes de poder usarla porque la gente deja la mugre y nadie la limpia, la fila larguísima y mal organizada (misma fila para pedir comida que para pagar un agua mineral), y muy lento  todo, además no tenían absolutamente nada del menú sin tacc. Mala organización para el ingreso al lugar, baños muy escasos para la cantidad de gente.

(Translated by Google)
Dirty, I had to clean the table before I could use it because people leave grime and nobody cleans it up. The line was incredibly long and poorly organized (the same line to order food as to pay for a bottle of water), and everything was very slow. Plus, they had absolutely nothing gluten-free on the menu. Poor organization for entering the place, and the restrooms were far too few for the number of people.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHb292Q0xREAE
